title: solidago scopulorum
intro: Solidago scopulorum, also known as the Mountain Goldenrod, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. Solidago scopulorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its purported health benefits.
